rules.title: Agent acts on an in-scope system with no risk management declared
rules.guidance: Declare a risk management process covering the agent's actions on the in-scope system.

rules.title: Agent acts on an in-scope system with no record-keeping declared
rules.guidance: Keep records of the agent's actions on the in-scope system to support incident handling.

rules.title: Agent acts on an in-scope system with no human oversight declared
rules.guidance: Declare a human oversight process for the agent's actions on the in-scope system.
